title: Homomorphic Encryption: Computing on Encrypted Data
author: Indigo Hayes
Cryptography Researcher
description: Perform computations on encrypted data with FHE—but performance is 100,000x slower
content:
Fully homomorphic encryption enables arbitrary computation on encrypted data.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Encryption Bottleneck (2040)](/docs/articles/encryption-bottleneck-2040)
plainText: Fully homomorphic encryption enables arbitrary computation on encrypted data. Related Chronicles : The Encryption Bottleneck (2040)
